title: The Boys Create Modpack
description: A light modpack that builds around some aspects of Create, so that you can enjoy a nice, steampunk world.
body:
# ⚙️ **The Boys Create Modpack** ⚙️

Welcome to **The Boys**, a **lightweight** modpack centered around the **Create** mod, allowing you to craft intricate machines, automate processes, and build a **stunning steampunk world**.

## 🌍 **What to Expect**
- **Create-Powered Automation** – Utilize gears, shafts, and steam-powered contraptions to revolutionize your world.
- **Immersive Steampunk Aesthetic** – Experience a beautifully designed world with Victorian-era machinery and airships.
- **Optimized for Performance** – A carefully selected set of mods ensures smooth gameplay without unnecessary bloat.
- **Expanding Creativity** – Build, tinker, and engineer complex contraptions without overwhelming mechanics.

## 🔧 **Perfect For**
- Players who love **Create** and want to enhance its potential.
- Builders looking for a **steampunk-themed** experience.
- Those who enjoy **automation and engineering** without a heavy modpack.

Jump in and craft your own **mechanized marvels** today! ⚙️🚂🔩
